URL: https://www.anthropic.com/news
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Anthropic News

## March 2026
- Mar 18: "What 81,000 people want from AI" — Largest multilingual qualitative study of AI user expectations
- Mar 12: $100 million investment into Claude Partner Network — supporting enterprise adoption at scale
- Mar 11: The Anthropic Institute launches — addressing challenges of powerful AI for societies
- Mar 10: Sydney becomes fourth Asia-Pacific office
- Mar 6: "Partnering with Mozilla to improve Firefox's security" — browser security collaboration
- Mar 5: "Where things stand with the Department of War" — Dario Amodei statement on national security

## February 2026
- Feb 27: Response to Secretary of War Pete Hegseth's comments
- Feb 26: CEO statement on Department of War negotiations
- Feb 25: Anthropic acquires Vercept for computer use capabilities
- Feb 24: Responsible Scaling Policy Version 3.0
- Feb 23: Distillation attack prevention capabilities
- Feb 17: Claude Sonnet 4.6 — frontier performance for coding, agents, professional work
- Feb 13: CodePath partnership for collegiate CS program
- Feb 12: $30 billion Series G funding at $380 billion valuation ($14B run-rate revenue)
- Feb 5: Claude Opus 4.6 upgrade — industry-leading model
- Feb 4: Commitment to keep Claude ad-free

## January 2026
- Jan 30: Claude assists NASA's Perseverance rover on Mars
- Jan 21: Mariano-Florentino Cuellar appointed to Long-Term Benefit Trust
- Jan 15: Scientists using Claude for research acceleration
- Jan 13: Labs platform introduction for experimental features
- Jan 11: HIPAA-ready infrastructure for healthcare; expanded clinical trial connectors

## December 2025
- Dec 18: Compliance framework for California AI transparency law

Product development, policy engagement, international expansion, enterprise partnerships (ServiceNow, Infosys, Accenture)
